{{Quote|I've only got the ultra-power blast left! So I'd better make darned sure it—''counts!''<nowiki></nowiki>|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="SW61" />}}
The '''ultra-power blast''' was a modification that allowed [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] to release their entire energy stores in one shot, thus creating a boosted energy bolt. It was installed by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] on the modified [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] of [[Flying Bantha Squadron]].

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|Also, your guns have been altered to fire only a half-dozen bursts at standard strength. After that, they release their entire energy stores in one shot, with enough power to cut through even the strongest shields! I suggest you choose your targets carefully, sir.|[[Unidentified Rebel sergeant (Arbra)|A Rebel sergeant]], to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="SW61" />}}
The ultra-power blast was capable of penetrating even the most powerful [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] and crippling [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] considerably.<ref name="SW61" />

==History==
[[File:Ultra-power_blast_2.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The effect of an ultra-power blast on an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]]]]
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] altered the [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] on the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] of [[Flying Bantha Squadron]] so that they could make use of an ultra-power blast. The TIE fighters were modified to fire only six laser bursts at standard strength, after which they would release their entire energy stores in a shot powerful enough to cut through even the strongest shields.<ref name="SW61" />

During their [[Battle of the secret armada|attack]] on the [[secret armada]], members of Flying Bantha Squadron used their ultra-power blasts to severely damage [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]], thus creating confusion among the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]. The [[Officer/Legends|officers]] of the damaged [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] followed standard procedure and counterattacked, but since it was unclear which ships had hit the targets, the [[Warship/Legends|warships]] lashed out at random, hitting many TIE fighters and even other [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], causing an escalation of confusion that spread throughout the fleet.<ref name="SW61" />

[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] then used his ultra-power blast on [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mils Giel|Giel's]] [[Praetor Mark II-class battlecruiser|''Praetor Mark II''-class battlecruiser]], the [[Helmsman (battlecruiser)|''Helmsman'']]. The boosted energy bolt destroyed the transport cage containing the [[Teezl]] and created an explosive chain reaction which took a great deal of the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] with it.<ref name="SW61" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 61|''Star Wars'' (1977) 61]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 61}} {{1st}}
